texto: Its been a long time we both talked properly. I guess its because many thing went wrong between us and ik that ab its difficult to get back on the road
autor: road on which we used to travel before. You know every time I open my messenger the first thing that i check is that whether you're online or not. Let's begin again and try not to discuss on old shits.. Love you
